title: Possessed Dummy negation returns Limited Summon

card.rawText: Play this card when your opponent sends a creature to their cemetery. Summon that creature as your Limited Summon. If this card or your primary creature is removed from the field, or this effect is negated, return it to their cemetery.

effect.value: Play this card when your opponent sends a creature to their cemetery. Summon that creature as your Limited Summon. If this card or your primary creature is removed from the field, or this effect is negated, return it to their cemetery.

plan.title: Possessed Dummy negation returns Limited Summon
plan.summary: If Possessed Dummy effect is negated, verify the stolen Limited Summon returns to opponent cemetery.

notes: Read text first: Play this card when your opponent sends a creature to their cemetery. Summon that creature as your Limited Summon. If this card or your primary creature is removed from the field, or this effect is negated, return it to their cemetery.

steps: Set up Possessed Dummy according to its printed text.
If Possessed Dummy effect is negated, verify the stolen Limited Summon returns to opponent cemetery.
